item.title: Preventing traffic routing regressions for Istio Virtual Services
item.description: Preventing traffic routing regressions for Istio Virtual Services This article was originaly posted in GetYourGuide’s Inside Blog. Understanding our traffic management One of the Reliability team’s responsibilities is to manage how traffic reaches our services, either from the internet, commonly known as north/south, or service to service, east/west. We run all our services on Kubernetes, and we have been using Istio since the beginning of 2019 for both network use cases.
